zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Combes於1404年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Sir Henry de Combes28歲，母親Mrs. Henry de Combs25歲。他於1439年與Lady Elizabeth Joseph在英國素福爾可庫姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1465年在英國戴文吉迪夏馬享年61歲，埋葬在英國戴文吉迪夏馬。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher Combes于1404年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Sir Henry de Combes28岁，母亲Mrs. Henry de Combs25岁。他于1439年与Lady Elizabeth Joseph在英国素福爾可庫姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1465年在英国戴文吉迪夏馬享年61岁，埋葬在英国戴文吉迪夏馬。

nameMeanings.name: Combes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (also Combès): topographic name from combe ‘narrow valley, ravine’ (see Combe ), or a habitational name from any of various places in southern France, for example in Hérault, named Combes.

variants.name: Coombs
meanings: English (southern): variant of Coombe , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Combes was born in 1404, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Henry de Combes, was 28 and his mother, Mrs. Henry de Combs, was 25. He married Lady Elizabeth Joseph in 1439, in Combs, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1465, in Gittisham, Devon, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Gittisham, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Combes est né en 1404, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry de Combes, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Henry de Combs, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Joseph en 1439, à Combs, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1465, à Gittisham, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Gittisham, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher Combes 1404 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry de Combes 28 und seine Mutter Mrs. Henry de Combs 25. Er hat 1439 in Combs, Suffolk, England Lady Elizabeth Joseph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1465 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Gittisham, Devon, England und wurde in Gittisham, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Combes è nato il nel 1404 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Henry de Combes, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Henry de Combs, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Joseph nel 1439, nel Combs, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1465, nel Gittisham, Devon, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Gittisham, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Combesが1404年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Combesは28歳，母Mrs. Henry de Combsは25歳であった。1439年にイギリススフォルクコンブズでLady Elizabeth Josephと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1465年にイギリスデボンギッティシャムで61歳で死去し，イギリスデボンギッティシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Combes(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry de Combes(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Henry de Combs(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1439년 영국 수폴크 코브스에서 Lady Elizabeth Joseph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 영국 데폰 지티샤에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 지티샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Combes nasceu em 1404, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry de Combes, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Henry de Combs, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Joseph em 1439, em Combs, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1465, em Gittisham, Devon, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Gittisham, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Combes родился в 1404 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Henry de Combes было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Henry de Combs, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Joseph в 1439 г. в местности комбс, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1465 г. в местности гиттишам, девон, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности гиттишам, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Christopher Combes nació en 1404, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry de Combes, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Henry de Combs, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Joseph en 1439, en Combs, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1465, en Gittisham, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Gittisham, Devon, Inglaterra.
